title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 540.330 - Charge to grand jury
text:
540.330.  Charge to grand jury. — In charging grand juries, the court shall apprise them of the provisions of sections 540.300 to 540.320, in relation to disclosures, and in what cases and under what circumstances any disclosures may or may not be made.
(RSMo 1939 § 3925) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3536; 1919 § 3881; 1909 § 5089
